content.query:
CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT parquet_format
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION = 'org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
);

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE SalesGold
WITH (
    LOCATION = '/gold/region_category_summary/',
    DATA_SOURCE = raw_ext_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
)
AS
SELECT
    Region,
    Category,
    Sub_Category,
    COUNT(*) AS Total_Orders,
    SUM(CAST(Sales AS FLOAT)) AS Total_Sales,
    SUM(Profit) AS Total_Profit
FROM SuperstoreSales
GROUP BY Region, Category, Sub_Category;


DROP EXTERNAL TABLE SuperstoreSales;

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE SuperstoreSales
(
    Row_ID          INT,
    Order_ID        VARCHAR(50),
    Order_Date      VARCHAR(50),
    Ship_Date       VARCHAR(50),
    Ship_Mode       VARCHAR(50),
    Customer_ID     VARCHAR(50),
    Customer_Name   VARCHAR(100),
    Segment         VARCHAR(50),
    Country         VARCHAR(50),
    City            VARCHAR(50),
    State           VARCHAR(50),
    Postal_Code     VARCHAR(20),
    Region          VARCHAR(20),
    Product_ID      VARCHAR(50),
    Category        VARCHAR(50),
    Sub_Category    VARCHAR(100),
    Product_Name    VARCHAR(255),
    Sales           VARCHAR(50),
    Quantity        VARCHAR(20),
    Discount        VARCHAR(20),
    Profit          FLOAT
)
WITH
(
    LOCATION = '/demo_data/Superstore.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = raw_ext_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = csv_format
);


DROP EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.SalesGold;
